title: Revert 'Add Milestone' dialog instructional text to user's original specification

requirements.summary: Revert or correct the instructional/helper text inside the 'Add Milestone' dialog on the VisionBoard page to match the user's original specification
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Add Milestone' dialog instructional/helper text matches the user's original specification exactly
No other logic, layout, or styling in the VisionBoard page is changed
The dialog opens and closes correctly without errors

file_operations.description: Locate the 'Add Milestone' dialog component within the VisionBoard page and revert or correct the instructional/helper text to match the user's original wording. Remove any AI-assumed phrasing. Ensure no changes are made to logic, layout, or styling—only update the text content of labels, placeholders, or helper text within the milestone dialog.
